questions.question:
Insert the following five records into the table: EmployeeID, Name, Department, Salary. The records are as follows:
EmployeeID = 101, Name = John Doe, Department = Sales, Salary = 50000
EmployeeID = 102, Name = Jane Doe, Department = Marketing, Salary = 60000
EmployeeID = 103, Name = Bob Smith, Department = IT, Salary = 70000
EmployeeID = 104, Name = Alice Johnson, Department = HR, Salary = 55000
EmployeeID = 105, Name = Mike Brown, Department = Finance, Salary = 65000
What is the salary of the employee with ID 102?

Insert the following five records into the table: City, Country, Population, Currency. The records are as follows:
City = New York, Country = USA, Population = 8537673, Currency = USD
City = London, Country = UK, Population = 8825000, Currency = GBP
City = Tokyo, Country = Japan, Population = 13639303, Currency = JPY
City = Paris, Country = France, Population = 2148241, Currency = EUR
City = Sydney, Country = Australia, Population = 5290000, Currency = AUD
What is the population of the city with the currency 'JPY'?

Insert the following five records into the table: StudentID, Name, Course, Grade. The records are as follows:
StudentID = 1, Name = John Doe, Course = Mathematics, Grade = A
StudentID = 2, Name = Jane Doe, Course = Science, Grade = B
StudentID = 3, Name = Bob Smith, Course = History, Grade = C
StudentID = 4, Name = Alice Johnson, Course = English, Grade = A
StudentID = 5, Name = Mike Brown, Course = Computer Science, Grade = B
Find the student whose grade is 'A' and whose course is 'History'.
